privileged_info_summary: The road_proximity_clip_analysis task uses synthetic GeoJSON data with 3 monitoring station points (Point A-C) and 2 road segments generated during environment initialization. All file paths are correctly specified: /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_points.geojson for monitoring stations, /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_lines.geojson for roads, and /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/impacted_roads_500m.geojson for output. The task requires reprojecting to EPSG:32610 (WGS 84 / UTM Zone 10N), creating a 500-meter buffer around stations, and clipping the road network. The output must include an impact_len field with road segment lengths in meters. The source data is in WGS84 coordinates with points spaced 247-470 meters apart.
